title: GABP Attention Object
description: Schema for summarized attention items that can influence execution ordering

attentionId.description: Stable identifier for this attention item

state.description: Lifecycle state of the attention item

severity.description: Highest summarized severity for this attention item

blocking.description: Whether bridge-side execution should be gated while this item is open

stateInvalidated.description: Whether prior game-state assumptions should be treated as stale

summary.description: Compact semantic summary of what requires attention

causalOperationId.description: Optional operation identifier associated with this attention item

causalMethod.description: Optional method, tool, or capability identifier associated with this attention item

openedAtSequence.description: First diagnostics-plane sequence associated with this attention item

latestSequence.description: Latest diagnostics-plane sequence associated with this attention item

diagnosticsCursor.description: Optional cursor the bridge can use to inspect more detailed diagnostics

totalUrgentEntries.description: Total number of summarized urgent entries represented by this item

sample.description: Optional representative sample of summarized urgent entries

level.description: Severity level for the sampled entry

repeatCount.description: Number of similar entries summarized by this sample

latestSequence.description: Latest diagnostics-plane sequence represented by this sample
